description: Peloton provides connected fitness hardware, subscription workout classes, and related web and mobile services. Its platform includes member accounts, workout content, and integrations with third-party health and fitness apps.
summary: Peloton exposes a public MCP server at https://mcp.onepeloton.com; its root metadata shows OAuth support, and the curated registry also indicates a no-auth mode. I found no public developer docs for REST, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces on onepeloton.com.
